items.title: Why the Dodgers Still Plan To Rest Shohei Ohtani Despite His Breakout Homer
items.summary: Though Shohei Ohtani broke out of a hitting funk and ended his home run drought, the Dodgers still plan to give him an offensive reset.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Man City pile pressure on Arsenal with Palace win
items.summary: Manchester City beat Crystal Palace 3-0 at the Etihad Stadium, closing the gap on leaders Arsenal to two points in the Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Durham to Bedford - Gay's 200-mile drive to tell parents of England call-up
items.summary: On the day he learned he would be England’s new opener, Emilio Gay drove from Durham to Bedford to tell his parents about his first international call-up.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
